testcase.name: test_full_pvp_flow_with_photo_selection_fix

failure.message: AssertionError: User 1 my_taps should be 30, got 1 assert 1 == 30 + where 1 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xffb008660680>('my_taps') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xffb008660680> = {'current_round': 1, 'my_dollar': 8900000.0, 'my_taps': 1, 'opponent_dollar': 6040000.0, ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_pvp_photo_selection_fix.py:250: in test_full_pvp_flow_with_photo_selection_fix assert state1.get("my_taps") == 30, f"User 1 my_taps should be 30, got {state1.get('my_taps')}" E AssertionError: User 1 my_taps should be 30, got 1 E assert 1 == 30 E + where 1 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xffb008660680>('my_taps') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xffb008660680> = {'current_round': 1, 'my_dollar': 8900000.0, 'my_taps': 1, 'opponent_dollar': 6040000.0, ...}.get
